title: Man under police supervision in hospital after double murder in KwaNonqaba
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One man was arrested in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One man was arrested in connection with two murders in KwaNonqaba yesterday, Saturday, 8 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One man was arrested in connection with two murders in KwaNonqaba yesterday, Saturday, 8 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, preliminary reports suggest KwaNonqaba Police were dispatched to a scene after community members alerted them of a man with a knife leaving a premises at Bantom Street at about 09:40.","html":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, preliminary reports suggest KwaNonqaba Police were dispatched to a scene after community members alerted them of a man with a knife leaving a premises at Bantom Street at about 09:40."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Upon arrival the members found a 43-year-old man. He was declared dead by paramedics on scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Thereafter police responded to another scene where a 46-year-old woman was found with stab wounds to the neck and arm. She was also declared dead by paramedics.","html":"“Thereafter police responded to another scene where a 46-year-old woman was found with stab wounds to the neck and arm. She was also declared dead by paramedics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Spies the suspect was found in the same vicinity with stab wounds, believed to be self-inflicted, to his chest and arrested in connection with the killing of the two victims.","html":"According to Spies the suspect was found in the same vicinity with stab wounds, believed to be self-inflicted, to his chest and arrested in connection with the killing of the two victims."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect is currently in hospital under police guard. He will appear in court once charged.","html":"The suspect is currently in hospital under police guard. He will appear in court once charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The motive for the killings is under investigation.","html":"The motive for the killings is under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man under police supervision in hospital after double murder in KwaNonqaba
